title: neottia punctata
intro: Neottia punctata, also known as the dotted ladies' tresses or punctate ladies' tresses, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neottia punctata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
